title: Frontend Quiz App
description: Test your frontend fundamentals with this interactive quiz app. Developed with React, semantic HTML, and styled using modern CSS.

title: GitSeeker
description: A responsive and accessible GitHub user profile search app. Built with React and styled with Tailwind CSS.

title: Responsive Menu with Cart
description: Accessible and responsive dessert menu with shopping cart, built with React, styled with Tailwind, and using WAI-ARIA best practices.

title: Password Generator App
description: Quickly generate a password of variable length and complexity. Built with vanilla JavaScript, semantic HTML, and pure CSS.
